title: Star Dream (cruiser)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the Yevethan cruiser|[[Star Dream (transport)]]}}
The '''''Star Dream''''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] serving with the forces of the [[Duskhan League]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].

==History==
At the start of the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]], ''Star Dream'' was the single ship sent by the [[Yevetha]] to destroy the small [[Brigian]] mining colony of [[New Brigia]] on the edge of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]].

The cruiser first landed a force of Yevethan soldiers in [[Dropship/Legends|dropships]], who massacred the settlers. Then, after the resistance had been destroyed, a broad-hulled cargo shuttle landed to seize the [[Chromite/Legends|chromite]] ore and processing machinery. Less than an hour after it had landed, the shuttle took off again and moved away as the ''Star Dream'' sterilized the settlement with salvos from its heavy batteries.

Its mission complete, the cruiser returned through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to [[N'zoth]] with a cargo of plundered chromite.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Star Dream'' is not to be confused with the ''[[Star Morning]]'', a [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that was also involved in the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
